description: Modify the PEBL Go/No-Go behavioral script at ~/pebl/experiments/fmri_gng/gng_task.pbl for an fMRI environment. Update the script variables to set the stimulus duration (gStimDur) to 500 ms, the inter-stimulus interval (gISIDur) to 2500 ms, and the Go response key (gGoKey) to "1". Configure the visual settings for dark mode by setting the background color (gBGColor) and window initialization (MakeWindow) to "black", and the foreground color (gFGColor) to "white". Ensure the output log file (gOutFile) is set to "gng_fmri_log.csv" and save the changes while maintaining valid PEBL syntax.
